{{CargoRelic
|name=Dolly Specimen
|rank=A
|affct=TECH
|birthday=05-17
|source=Fragment Crafting (31.5%), Lottery Machine (0.66%), Wishing (2.9%), Expert Scrolls (7.6%)
|description=On May 17, 1996, the cloning sheep Dolly was released to the public. 

Dolly's genetic mother is a Finn Dorset sheep and both her mitochondrial and surrogate mother are Scottish Blackface. Their recombined genes made it possible for Dolly to be born. Dolly lived for only 7 years but it has provided lots of data for scientific research, including a new direction for saving endangered animals and protecting the ecosystem.

[Other clones]

Macaque: 2000, Tetra, female<br>Cow: 2001, Alpha and Beta, males<br>Rabbit: 2003, achieved in France<br>Mule: 2003, Idaho Gem<br>Pig: 2005, first donor cell cloned pig in China
|fame=43
|art=28
|fth=39
|civ=42
|tech=61
|ss1=Per 5 Minions cloned, Snail HP +20<br>Per 5 Minions cloned, Snail ATK +2<br>Minions Cloned: 100/100
|ss2=Per 5 Minions cloned, Snail HP +40<br>Per 5 Minions cloned, Snail ATK +4<br>Minions Cloned: 100/100
|ss3=Per 5 Minions cloned, Snail HP +60<br>Per 5 Minions cloned, Snail ATK +6<br>Minions Cloned: 100/100
|ss4=Per 5 Minions cloned, Snail HP +100<br>Per 5 Minions cloned, Snail ATK +10<br>Minions Cloned: 100/100
|ss5=Per 5 Minions cloned, Snail HP +140<br>Per 5 Minions cloned, Snail ATK +14<br>Minions Cloned: 100/100
|ss7=Per 5 Minions cloned, Snail HP +140<br>Per 5 Minions cloned, Snail ATK +14<br>Minions Cloned: 100/100<br>Snail HP +700 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Britland skill II.png|50px]] Place in Britland Museum: This Relic's TECH +10
|skill2=[[File:Genesim skill II.png|50px]] Place in Gene Sim Device: This Relic's TECH +10
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Purple Relics]]
[[Category:TECH Relics]]
[[Category:Purple TECH Relics]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Britland Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Gene Simulation Compass Boost]]
[[Category:Fungus Farm Boost]]
[[Category:Mecha Cell Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Minions Cloned]]
